error_signature: adding a list to a list results in nested arrays
title: Incorrect array merging leads to nested arrays
symptom: When attempting to add a list of values to an existing array, the result is a nested array instead of a flat array. This leads to unexpected data structures.
applies_when: Trying to append a list to an existing array
not_this_if: Appending a single object instead of a list
root_cause: The issue arises because the operation is treating the list being added as a single entity, resulting in it being nested within the existing array rather than merging the values directly into it.
fix_steps: Use a merge function or method to combine the two arrays
Ensure that the list being added is flattened into the existing array
agent_instruction: Merge the new list with the existing array to avoid nesting.
